name: Knowledge Memory
description: Personal knowledge base. /webhook/remember saves facts to /knowledge/<topic>.md (Haiku-deduped). /webhook/recall greps /knowledge for a query.

parameters.jsCode:
const v = $('Validate Remember').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: false, error: v.error } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 256, system: $json.system_prompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.user_prompt }] }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const v = $('Validate Recall').first().json;
return [{ json: { success: false, error: v.error } }];
